title: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod Bare Bones Compatibility
description: This is a addon for the Bare Bones Resource Pack to add support for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod!
body:
This is a addon for the Bare Bones Resource Pack to add support for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod!


Finally updated after 2 years!
